jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group!
